text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm. So this shrine's supposed to keep evil away,
huh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio and I have come to visit a shrine famous for
warding off evil. Naturally, there's a good reason
for this...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What should I do, Trainer? I think I might be
cursed!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It all started when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio explains how she watched a supposedly
cursed video that's been going around, and has
been feeling off ever since.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's not like I'm scared or anything! There's no way I could be cursed, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But, you know, just in case!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...You know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Teio seems thoroughly spooked by this
whole experience, I agree to take her to visit a
shrine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so I just need to make a wish right here!
Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: PLEASE, PLEASE, PLEAAASE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio forcefully claps her hands together
and bows.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that should do it! I prayed with all my
heart!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: The curse has got to be lifted!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, I mean, it's not like I'm scared or anything,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's head back! Come on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We start to leave the shrine when...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Whoa, whoa, whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She slips on a fallen leaf and loses her balance!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Did you see that? I didn't fall! Isn't that
crazy?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: My body felt super light all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! That means the curse must be lifted!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean... it's not like I was worried or anything,
though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's trying to hide it, as usual, but I can see her
smile in relief.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She slips on a fallen leaf and loses her balance!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She proceeds to fall flat on her butt.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ughhh. I can't believe I fell down like that!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait! Do you think it's the curse?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Trainer. Mind if I take a look at those
lucky charms over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio ends up buying three charms to ward off her
curse.
